title: Iron Front
description: This Project Has Tons of War Based Mods specialised for multiplayer war between factions.
body:
# Iron Front: Total Warfare

Step onto the battlefield in **Iron Front**, a hardcore war-themed modpack for **Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)**. Immerse yourself in large-scale combat, military gear, and strategic warfare across diverse terrains.

## Features

- **Tanks, Artillery & Vehicles** – Dominate the battlefield with heavy machinery.  
- **Advanced Weapons & Armor** – Arm yourself for close-quarters or ranged combat.  
- **Fortifications & Bases** – Build bunkers, watchtowers, and defensive structures.  
- **Teamplay & Strategy** – Coordinate with allies, plan ambushes, and defend your territory.  
- **Dynamic Battlefields** – Engage in raids, sieges, and large-scale warfare scenarios.

Whether you’re storming enemy lines or defending your base, **Iron Front** challenges you to survive—and conquer—in a world at war.
